response.step_by_step_log:
1. Analyzed the video and identified dialogue at the beginning, a song performance from 00:58 to 03:59, and a closing monologue from 03:59 to the end.
2. Extracted song title 'Asu no Yozora Shoukaihan' (アスノヨゾラ哨戒班) and artist 'Orangestar' from the on-screen text.
3. Performed a web search using: '"Asu no Yozora Shoukaihan" Orangestar Japanese and English lyrics'.
4. Successfully retrieved the lyrics in both Japanese and English.
5. Structured the scenes and metadata into the required JSON format.
response.global_summary: This video segment captures a segment from the 'Murasaki Shion Graduation LIVE'. It begins with a dialogue between Murasaki Shion and Usada Pekora, followed by a musical performance of 'Asu no Yozora Shoukaihan' by Shion, Pekora, Oozora Subaru, and Yozora Mel, and concludes with an outro and monologue by Shion.

scenes.description: Dialogue between characters Murasaki Shion and Usada Pekora.
Musical performance of 'Asu no Yozora Shoukaihan' by Murasaki Shion, Usada Pekora, Oozora Subaru, and Yozora Mel, with on-screen song title and artist credits.
scenes.performer_in_video: Murasaki Shion, Usada Pekora, Oozora Subaru, Yozora Mel

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Depending on my mood, I am a boy who picks out his enemies to fight
With no future I want to fulfill, I was just waiting to be drawn into a dream
But still, the future is scary, I hate tomorrow, and wish upon the past
There's nothing more I can do, I scream
Tomorrow, tomorrow, don't come yet
Leaving that kind of me behind

If only I could, I'd want to leave this world and fly into the sky
But there is no such thing as being able to fly without you
I, by myself, am just walking
Even if it's just an illusion that blows away in the wind of love
I'll break it, if I wish for it, if I struggle, even if I'm torn

If I wish for it, it will come true
If I'm with you, then even if it's painful, it's alright, that's what I said
If I say I don't want to leave you, I'll make you laugh again

Everything in this world is changing, and even if I'm serious, it's cruel
Whatever you expect of me, the future is cruel
Even so, I will still look at this world
Because this world, the one I was looking at with you, is truly beautiful

I haven't forgotten, so I will remember it
I'm shutting it away so I won't forget it
If you're not there, I can't even fly, that's just a delusion
I, by myself, am just walking
Everything is an illusion that blows away in the wind of love
I'll break it, if I wish for it, if I struggle, even if I'm torn

If I wish for it, it will come true
If I'm with you, then even if it's painful, it's alright, that's what I said
If I say I don't want to leave you, I'll make you laugh again

Even if I scream, even if I'm torn
Even if I cry, tomorrow will still come
Even if I don't want to, it will come, that's just how it is

I don't need a future, because I want to be with you
I'm shouting today, the day I will remember forever
Tomorrow, tomorrow, don't come yet
If I wish for it, it will come true

If I'm with you, then even if it's painful, it's alright, that's what I said
If I say I don't want to leave you, I'll make you laugh again
If I say I don't want to leave you, I'll make you laugh again

scenes.description: Monologue and outro by Murasaki Shion.
